response.justification: The candidate lacks substantial C++ experience and industrial automation domain knowledge critical for this role; while they have some C++ exposure from a 6-month NI role and a bachelor’s thesis, their career has been dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web-focused stacks, with no evidence of multi-threaded systems, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols like MQTT/OPC UA.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Proven track record in open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Experience with high-performance systems and event-driven architectures using DLang and Node.js
concerns: Minimal recent or deep C++ experience beyond academic/early career work
No demonstrated exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or automation protocols
Primary tech stack is web-centric (TypeScript/Node.js) with no cloud or IoT platform experience relevant to the role
